mapper.sql: id, student_id, template_id, course_id, class_id, group_id, teacher_id, attempt_no, status, is_completed, started_at, submitted_at, completed_at, duration_seconds, params_json, params_diff_json, student_result_json, student_result_text, score, score_breakdown_json, graded_by, graded_at, token_total, token_prompt, token_completion, token_embedding, token_cost, model_name, model_provider, temperature, max_output_tokens, runtime_env_json, client_ip, user_agent, error_code, error_message, template_snapshot_json, metadata, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_experiment_attempts ( student_id, template_id, course_id, class_id, group_id, teacher_id, attempt_no, status, is_completed, started_at, submitted_at, completed_at, duration_seconds, params_json, params_diff_json, student_result_json, student_result_text, score, score_breakdown_json, graded_by, graded_at, token_total, token_prompt, token_completion, token_embedding, token_cost, model_name, model_provider, temperature, max_output_tokens, runtime_env_json, client_ip, user_agent, error_code, error_message, template_snapshot_json, metadata, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{studentId}, #{templateId}, #{courseId}, #{classId}, #{groupId}, #{teacherId}, #{attemptNo}, #{status}, #{isCompleted}, #{startedAt}, #{submittedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{durationSeconds}, #{paramsJson}, #{paramsDiffJson}, #{studentResultJson}, #{studentResultText}, #{score}, #{scoreBreakdownJson}, #{gradedBy}, #{gradedAt}, #{tokenTotal}, #{tokenPrompt}, #{tokenCompletion}, #{tokenEmbedding}, #{tokenCost}, #{modelName}, #{modelProvider}, #{temperature}, #{maxOutputTokens}, #{runtimeEnvJson}, #{clientIp}, #{userAgent}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{templateSnapshotJson}, #{metadata}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
